title: WebP CVE (libwebp Huffman heap overflow)
html:
Stub. The 2023 libwebp Huffman-table heap-overflow vulnerability (CVE-2023-4863 territory) Yahir studied as the canonical real-world buffer overflow exemplar in spring 2025. Mechanism: decoder pre-allocates FIXED_TABLE_SIZE + N per-channel; an attacker-supplied incomplete-binary-tree Huffman table forces over-allocation of second-level lookup tables, blowing past the bound. Write primitive lives in GetNextKey's bit-reversal indexing; attacker controls the 2-byte value field of HuffmanCode.

Sources

  • 2025 05 14 screenshot 2025 05 14 at 9 46 10 am 97029c8a — overflow mechanism
  • 2025 05 14 screenshot 2025 05 14 at 9 46 32 am ef6b2625 — write primitive + index reversal
